---
applyTo: "contents/**/*.md,index.html"
description: "Use when editing this personal academic website. Keep user-facing website content in English unless the user explicitly requests another language."
---

# Personal Website English Content

- Write user-facing website content in English by default.
- Keep navigation labels, section titles, body copy, captions, and footer text in English.
- Preserve official names of universities, labs, datasets, awards, and paper titles in their standard published form.
- Use a concise, academic tone suitable for a personal research website.
- Avoid mixing Chinese and English in the same website sentence unless the user explicitly requests bilingual content.
- If the user asks for bilingual content, keep English first and add Chinese only where requested.
